answer: Copper does not offer a free tier for API access [1][2]. API access is a paid feature that is gated behind the Professional and Business subscription plans [1][3][2]. While there is no permanent free plan, Copper does provide a 14-day free trial on all paid plans, which does not require a credit card to initiate [1][2]. Accessing the platform API requires authentication and subscription to a qualifying tier [4][1][3].
